question:
Three partners invested in a business in the ratio 6:1:5. They invested their
capitals for 7 months, 10 months and 8 months, respectively. What was the
ratio of their profits?
तीन वाझेदारों ने एक व्यलवाय में 6 : 1 : 5 के अनऩु ात में ननलळे ककया। उन्होंने अऩनी ऩूूंजी क्रमळः
7 माश, 10 माश और 8 माश के नऱए ननलेळ की। उनके ऱाभों का अनुऩात ज्ञात कीनजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three partners shared the profit in a business in the ratio 8: 7: 5. They invested
their capitals for 7 months, 8 months and 14 months, respectively. What was
the ratio of their capitals?
तीन भागीदार, ककवी व्याऩार में हुए ऱाभ कॉ 8: 7: 5 के अनुऩात में बाूंटते शैं। उन्श ोंने अऩनी ऩूूंजी कॉ क्रमळः
7 माश, 8 माश और 14 माश के नऱए ननलेनळत ककया था। उनकी ऩूूंजी का अनुऩात ज्ञात कर।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C invested capitals in the ratio 3:4:8. At the end of the business period, they
got profits in the ratio 2 : 3 : 5. What is the ratio of their time invested?
A, B और C ने 3 : 4 : 8 के अनुऩात में ऩूूँजी ननलळे की। ब्याऩार अलधध के अूंत में, उन्हें 2 : 3 : 5 के
अनुऩात में ऱाभ प्राप्त हुआ। उनका ननलेनळत वमय का अनुऩात क्या शै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P's investment in a business is 3/4 of Q's investment. Q gained a profit of
Rs.1200 by investing Rs.40000 in the business. What will be the ratio of P's
profit to his investment in the business?
ककवी व्यलवाय में P का ननलेळ Q के ननलेळ का 3/4 शै। Q ने व्यलवाय में 40000 रुऩये का ननलळे करके
1200 रुऩये का ऱाभ प्राप्त ककया। व्यलवाय में P के ऱाभ का उवके ननलेळ वे अनऩु ात क्या शॉगा?
UP POLICE ASSISTANT OPERATOR 2024
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
₹44,200 was divided among A, B and C such that 3 times the share of A = 9
times the share of B = 4 times the share of C. Find the share of A.
₹44,200 कॉ A, B और C के बीच इव प्रकार कलभानजत ककया गया कक A के हशस्से का 3 गुना = B
के हशस्से का 9 गुना = C के हशस्से का 4 गुना शै। A का हशस्सा ज्ञात कीनजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Parvati and Pari invest in a business in the ratio 5 : 26. If total profit is Rs. 3038,
then what is difference between the profit (in Rs.) of Parvati and Pari?
BY Gagan Pratap
ऩालवती और ऩरी एक व्यलवाय में 5:26 के अनुऩात में ननलेळ करती शैं। यदद कु ऱ ऱाभ रु. 3038 शै,
तॉ ऩालवती और ऩरी के ऱाभ (रुऩये में) के बीच क्या अूंतर शै?
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P, Q and R invest a sum in the ratio of 59 : 14 : 72, respectively. If they earned a
total profit of ₹4,790 at the end of the year, what is the difference between the
shares of Q and R?
P, Q और R ने क्रमळः 59 : 14 : 72 के अनुऩात में धनरानळ का ननलेळ ककया। यदद उन्होंने लऴ व के
अूंत में कु ऱ ₹4,790 का ऱाभ अनजित ककया, तॉ Q और R के हशस्सों में ककतना अूंतर शै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A company earns a profit (in ₹) that is distributed among the company's
three partners in the ratio of 12 : 3 : 14. If the difference between the smallest
and the largest shares is ₹61,699, the total profit (in ₹) of the company is:
ककवी कूं ऩनी द्वारा अनजित ऱाभ (₹ में) कॉ कूं ऩनी के तीन वाझेदारों के बीच 12 : 3 : 14 के अनुऩात
में बाूंट ददया जाता शै। यदद वबवे छॉटे और वबवे बडे हशस्से में अूंतर ₹61,699 शै, तॉ कूं ऩनी का कु ऱ
ऱाभ (₹ में) ज्ञात कीनजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C started a business investing ₹2,410, ₹1,170 and ₹700, respectively. If
B's share in the profit earned by them is ₹1,092. What is the difference in the
profit (in ₹) earned by A and C?
A, B और C ने क्रमळः ₹2,410, ₹1,170 और ₹700 का ननलेळ करके एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। यदद
उनके द्वारा अनजित ऱाभ में B का हशस्सा ₹1,092 शै, तॉ A और C द्वारा अनजित ऱाभ में ककतना अूंतर
(₹ में) शै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Neha, Rajat, and Avinash invest ₹1,430, ₹1,680, and ₹1,340, respectively, to
start a business. If the profit at the end of the year is ₹1,780, then what is the
share of Avinash in the profit?
नेशा, रजत और अकलनाळ ने क्रमळः ₹1,430, ₹1,680 और ₹1,340 का ननलेळ करके एक व्यलवाय
ळुू  ककया। यदद लऴव के अतूं में ऱाभ ₹1,780 शै, तॉ ऱाभ में अकलनाळ का हशस्सा ज्ञात कीनजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three partners P. Q and R invested a total of Rs. 41600 in a business. At the end
of the year. P got Rs. 1430, Q got Rs. 1870 and R. got Rs. 2420 as the share of
profit. How much amount did Q invest in the business?
तीन वाझेदारों P, Q और R ने एक व्यलवाय में कु ऱ Rs.41600 का ननलेळ ककया।लऴ व के अूंत म ें
ऱाभ के हशस्स े के ू ऩ म,ें P कॉ Rs.1430 Q कॉ Rs. 1870 और R कॉ Rs.2420 नमऱे। Q
नेव्यलवाय म ें ककतनी रानळ का ननलेळ ककया?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Abdul and Mohsin together invested ₹79,200 in a business. At the end of the
year, out of a total profit of ₹14,400, Mohsin's share was ₹2,600. What was the
difference between their investments?
अब्दऱु और मॉशनवन ने नमऱकर एक व्यलवाय में ₹79,200 का ननलेळ ककया। लऴव के अूंत में,
₹14,400 के कु ऱ ऱाभ में वे, मॉशनवन का हशस्सा ₹2,600 था। उनके ननलेळों में ककतना अूंतर था?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Kushal and Brijesh together invested ₹37,100 in a business. At the end of the
year, out of a total profit of ₹12,000, Brijesh's share was ₹5,700. What was the
difference between their investments?
कु ळऱ और बृजेळ ने नमऱकर एक व्यलवाय में ₹37,100 का ननलेळ ककया। लऴव के अूंत में, ₹12,000
के कु ऱ ऱाभ में वे, बृजेळ का हशस्सा ₹5,700 था। उनके ननलेळों में ककतना अूंतर था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C started a business. A invested 33 of the total capital, B invested
33 of the remaining capital and C, the remaining. If the total profit at the
end of the year was Rs 4050, then find the amount by which the profit of C
exceeds the profit of B?
A, B और C ने एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। A ने कु ऱ ऩूूंजी का 33 ननलेळ ककया, B ने ळेऴ ऩूूंजी
का 33 ननलेळ ककया और C ने ळेऴ का ननलळे ककया। यदद लऴव के अतूं में कु ऱ ऱाभ 4050
रुऩये था, तॉ C का ऱाभ B के ऱाभ वे ककतनी अधधक शै?
(UP CONSTABLE RE -EXAM 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C invested their capitals in the ratio 2:3:5. The ratio of months for
which they invested is 4:2:3, respectively. If the difference between the profit
shares of A and B is ₹1,86,000, then C's share of profit (in ₹) is:
BY Gagan Pratap
A, B और C ने 2 : 3 : 5 के अनुऩात में अऩनी ऩूूंजी ननलेळ की। उन्होंने नजतने मशीनों के नऱए
ननलेळ ककया था उनका अनुऩात क्रमळ: 4:2:3 शै। यदद A और B के ऱाभ हशस्सों के बीच का अतूं र
₹1,86,000 शै, तॉ C के ऱाभ का हशस्सा (₹ में) ज्ञात कर।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P , Q and R jointly start a business. It was agreed that P would invest ₹25,000
for 6 months, Q ₹44,000 for 5 months and R ₹50,000 for 3 months. Out of total
profit of ₹1,04,000, the amount received by P will be :
P, Q और R वूंयुक्त ू ऩ वे एक व्यलवाय ळुू  करते शैं। यश वशमधत हुई कक P, 6 मशीने के नऱए
₹25,000 का, Q, 5 मशीने के नऱए ₹44,000 का, और R, 3 मशीने के नऱए ₹50,000 का ननलेळ
करगे ा। ₹1,04,000 के कु ऱ ऱाभ में वे, P कॉ ककतनी रानळ प्राप्त शॉगी ?
(RRB GROUP -D 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Praveen and Hemant start a business. Praveen invests ₹16,000 more than
Hemant for 7 months and Hemant invests for 6 months. Praveen's share is
₹1,007 more than that of Hemant, out of a total profit of ₹7,049. Find the capital
contributed by Praveen.
प्रलीण और शेमूंत एक व्यलवाय ळुू  करते शैं। प्रलीण, 7 मशीने के नऱए शेमूंत व े ₹16,000 अधधक
ननलेळ करता शै और शेमूंत, 6 मशीने के नऱए ननलेळ करता शै। ₹7,049 के कु ऱ ऱाभ में वे प्रलीण
का हशस्सा, शेमूंत के हशस्स े वे ₹1,007 अधधक शै। प्रलीण द्वारा ननलेनळत ऩूूँजी ज्ञात कीनजए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Ritik and Sanjay together invested ₹79,200 in a business. At the end of the
year, out of a total profit of ₹16,500, Sanjay's share was ₹3,600. What was the
difference between their investments?
ऋधतक और वूंजय ने नमऱकर एक व्यलवाय में ₹79,200 का ननलेळ ककया। लऴव के अतूं में,
₹16,500 के कु ऱ ऱाभ में वे वूंजय का हशस्सा ₹3,600 था। उनके ननलेळों में ककतना अूंतर था?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
M and N started a business. M invested ₹31,000 more than N for 2 months,
while N invested for 7 months. M's share is ₹139 more than that of N, out of a
total profit of ₹5,977. Find the capital contributed by M.
M और N ने एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। M ने 2 मशीने के नऱए N वे ₹31,000 अधधक ननलेळ ककया,
जबकक N ने 7 मशीने के नऱए ननलेळ ककया। ₹5,977 के कु ऱ ऱाभ में वे M का हशस्सा, N के हशस्स े
वे ₹139 अधधक शै। M द्वारा ननलेनळत ऩूूँजी ज्ञात कीनजए।
BY Gagan Pratap
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A invests 6,00,000 more than B in a business. B invests his capital for
months, while A invests his capital for more months than B. Out of the total
profit of 12,40,000, if the share of B is 2,48,000 less than the share of A, then the
capital of B is:
A ने एक व्यलवाय में B वे 6,00,000 अधधक ननलेळ ककया। B ने अऩनी ऩूूंजी माश के नऱए
ननलेळ की, जबकक A ने अऩनी ऩूूंजी B वे माश अधधक के नऱए ननलेळ की। 12,40,000 के कु ऱ
ऱाभ मे वे यदद B का हशस्सा A के हशस्से वे 2,48,000 कम शै, तॉ B की ऩजूूं ी ककतनी थी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Akshay started a business, and he invested Rs.60,000. After some months,
Rajni came to join with him and invest Rs.1,50,000. At the end of the year, the
total profit was divided among them into the ratio 42 : 35. After how many
months did Rajni join?
अक्षय एक व्यलवाय आरभूं करता शै, और लश ₹60,000 का ननलेळ करता शै। कु छ मशीने बाद,
रजनी उवके वाथ व्यलवाय में ळानमऱ शॉने के नऱए आता शै और ₹1,50,000 का ननलळे करता शै।
लऴव के अूंत म,ें कु ऱ ऱाभ कॉ उनके बीच 42 : 35 के अनुऩात में कलभानजत ककया जाता शै। ककतन े
मशीने बाद, रजनी व्यलवाय में ळानमऱ हुआ था?
(RRB RPF CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Sathi and Rathin invested some money in a business in the ratio 6 : 5, but
Sathi withdrew her money after a few months. If the end-of- twelve-months'
profit was shared between Sathi and Rathin in the ratio 7 : 10, for how many
months did Rathin alone invest ?
वती और रथथन ने 6 : 5 अनुऩात में ककवी व्यलवाय में कु छ ऩैवे का ननलेळ ककया, ऱेककन कु छ
मशीनों के बाद वती ने अऩना ऩैवा लाऩव ऱे नऱया। यदद बारश मशीने के अूंत में ऱाभ 7 : 10 के
अनुऩात में वती और रथथन के बीच वाझा ककया गया था, तॉ रथथन ने ककतने मशीने अके ऱे ननलेळ
ककया था ?
(UP CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Ashish, Lalita and Pranav started a business in partnership, investing in the ratio of
21 : 9 : 20, respectively. At the end of the year, they earned a profit of ₹84,700, which is
28% of their total investment. How much did Lalita invest (in ₹)?
BY Gagan Pratap
आळीऴ, ऱनऱता और प्रणल ने क्रमळः 21 : 9 : 20 के अनुऩात में ननलेळ करके वाझेदारी में एक
व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। लऴ व के अूंत में उन्हें ₹84,700 का ऱाभ प्राप्त हुआ, जॉ उनके कु ऱ ननलेळ का
28% शै। ऱनऱता ने ककतना ननलेळ (₹ में) ककया था?
(RRB NTPC Graduate Level 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B, C subscribe a sum of 75500 for a busineess. A subscribes 3500 rupees
more than B. and B subscribes 4500 rupees more than C. Out of a total profit
of 45300 rupees, how much does a receive?
A, B, C ककवी व्यलवाय मे 75500 रु की धनरानळ ऱगाना स्वीकार करते शै। A, B वे 3500 रु
अधधक ऱगाता शै, और B, C वे 4500 रु अधधक ऱगाता शै। कु ऱ ऱाभ 45300 रु मे वे A कॉ
ककतनी धनरानळ नमऱेगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A and B invested money in a business in the ratio of 8 : 5. If 35% of the total profit goes
for charity, and A's share in the profit is ₹7,770, what is the total profit?
A और B एक व्यलवाय में 8:5 के अनुऩात में धन ननलेळ करते शैं। यदद कु ऱ ऱाभ का 35% दान में
दे ददया जाता शै और ऱाभ में A का हशस्सा ₹7,770 शै, तॉ कु ऱ ऱाभ ककतना शै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Alok, Gita, and Suresh invest ₹56,000, ₹52,000, and ₹69,000 respectively to
start a business. At the end of the year, the total profit earned is ₹76,700. 31%
of the total profit earned is given to charity and the rest is divided among
them in the ratio of their investment. What will be the share of Suresh (in ₹)?
आऱॉक, गीता और वुरळे ने एक व्यलवाय ळुू  करने के नऱए क्रमळः ₹56,000, ₹52,000 और
₹69,000 का ननलेळ ककया। लऴव के अूंत में अनजित कु ऱ ऱाभ ₹76,700 शै। अनजित कु ऱ ऱाभ का
31% दान में ददया जाता शै और ळेऴ कॉ उनके ननलेळ के अनुऩात में उनके बीच कलभानजत ककया
जाता शै। वुरळे का हशस्सा (₹ में) ककतना शॉगा?
(RRB NTPC Graduate Level 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three people, A, B and C, invest in a business in the ratio 2 : 3 : 5. It was decided
that 9% of the profits will go to charity. If the total profit was ₹2,50,000, then
find the share of C in the profit (in ₹).
तीन व्यथक्त, A, B और C, एक व्यलवाय में 2: 3: 5 के अनुऩात में ननलेळ करते शैं। यश ननणवय नऱया
गया कक ऱाभ का 9% दान में जाएगा। यदद कु ऱ ऱाभ ₹2,50,000 था, तॉ ऱाभ में C का हशस्सा (₹
में) ज्ञात कीनजए।
(SSC CGL 2024 Pre)
BY Gagan Pratap
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Umar and Avinash started a partnership with investments of ₹ 10,000 and ₹
15,000, respectively but due to a financial emergency the latter had to
withdraw his investment after 8 months. In what ratio should the profit of the
first twelve months be shared among
उमर और अकलनाळ ने क्रमळः ₹10,000 और ₹15,000 के ननलेळ के वाथ वाझेदारी ळुरु की,
ऱेककन कलत्तीय वमस्या के कारण, अकलनाळ ने 8 मशीने बाद अऩना ननलळे लाऩव ऱे नऱया। ऩशऱे
बारश माव का ऱाभ दॉनों में ककव अनुऩात में बाूंटा जाना चाहशए?
RRB ALP 09/08/2018 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Ren and Martin started a company on 1 March 2019. The ratio of their
investments was 5 : 4. Martin left the company after 15 months. In what ratio
must the profit be divided at the end of 2 years ?
रने और माहटि न ने 1 माचव 2019 कॉ एक कूं ऩनी ळुू  की। उनके ननलळे का अनुऩात 5 : 4 था।
माहटि न ने 15 मशीने बाद कूं ऩनी छॉड दी। 2 लऴव के अूंत में प्राप्त ऱाभ कॉ ककव अनुऩात में
कलभानजत ककया जाना चाहशए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Mr. Sharma, Mr. Gupta and Ms Sinha invested ₹ 4,000, ₹8,000 and ₹6,000,
respectively, in a business. Mr. Sharma left after 6 months. If after 8 months,
there was a gain of ₹34,000, then what will be the share of Mr. Gupta ?
श्रीमान ळमाव, श्रीमान गुप्ता और श्रीमती नवन्हा ककवी व्यलवाय में क्रमळः ₹4,000, ₹8,000 और
₹6,000 ननलेनळत करत े शैं। 6 मशीने बाद, श्रीमान ळमाव व्यलवाय छॉड देते शैं। यदद 8 मशीने बाद
₹34,000 का ऱाभ हुआ शॉ, तॉ श्रीमान गुप्ता का हशस्सा ककतना शॉगा ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
X and Y enter into a partnership with capital in the ratio 3: 5. After 5 months X
adds 50% of his capital, while Y withdraws 60% of his capital. What is the
share (in ₹ lakhs) of X in the annual profit of ₹ 6.84 lakhs?
X और Y, 3 : 5 के अनुऩात में ऩूूंजी के वाथ वाझेदारी करते शैं। 5 मशीने बाद, X अऩनी ऩूूंजी में 50%
जॉडता शै, जबकक Y अऩनी ऩूूंजी का 60% ननकाऱता शै। ₹6.84 ऱाख के लाकऴिक ऱाभ में X का
हशस्सा (₹ ऱाख में) ज्ञात कीनजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Mohit and Ravi started a business with their capitals in the ratio : After 4
months, Mohit increased his capital by 25% and Ravi reduced his capital by
one-fifth. At the end of a year, if B's share in the annual profit was 20.8 lakhs,
then what was the annual profit (in ₹lakhs)?
मॉहशत और रकल ने के अनुऩात में अऩनी ऩूूँजी ऱगाकर एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। 4 मशीन े
बाद, मॉहशत ने अऩनी ऩजूूं ी में 25% की लृद्धि की और रकल ने अऩनी ऩूूंजी में की कमी की। एक
लऴ व के अूंत में, यदद लाकऴिक ऱाभ में B का हशस्सा रुऩये 20.8 ऱाख था, तॉ लाकऴिक ऱाभ (रुऩय े
ऱाख में) ककतना था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question: Three persons P, Q, and R started a business with their shares in the ratio 11 : 8 :
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
After 9 months, Q withdrew his 35% share, while R withdrew his 14% share 7
months prior to completion of the year. If the total profit at the end of the year
is ₹40,700, find the share of R (in ₹) in the profit.
तीन व्यथक्त P, Q और R ने 11 : 8 : 20 के अनुऩात में अऩने हशस्सों के वाथ एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया।
9 मशीने बाद, Q ने अऩना 35% हशस्सा लाऩव ऱे नऱया, जबकक R ने लऴव ऩरू ा शॉने व े 7 मशीने ऩशऱे
अऩना 14% हशस्सा लाऩव ऱे नऱया। यदद लऴव के अूंत में कु ऱ ऱाभ ₹40,700 शै, तॉ ऱाभ में R का
हशस्सा (₹ में) ज्ञात कीनजए।
(RRB NTPC Graduate Level 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C started a business with intial investments of 20000, 25000 and
10000, respectively. After 5 months from start, A invested 4000 more. After 6
months fro start, C invested 8000 more. After 4 months from start, B
withdrew 8000.At the end of the year, they will receive a profit of ‘x’. In what
ratio they will share the profit?
A, B तथा C ने क्रमळः 20000, 25000 तथा 10000 के आरनूं भक ननलेळ के वाथ एक व्याऩार
प्रारभूं ककया। प्रारभूं वे 5 माश ऩश्चात, A ने 4000 और ननलेळ ककए। प्रारभूं वे 6 माश ऩश्चात, C ने
8000 और ननलेळ ककए। प्रारभूं व े 4 माश ऩश्चात, B ने 8000 लाऩव ननकाऱ नऱए। लऴव के अूंत में,
उन्हें 'X' का ऱाभ प्राप्त शॉगा। ल े ककव अनुऩात में ऱाभ कॉ बाूँटेग?े
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C started a business in partnership. Initially, A invested Rs. 29,000,
while B and C invested Rs.25,000 each. After 4 months, A withdrew Rs. 3,000.
After 2 more months, C invested Rs. 12,000 more. Find the share of C (in Rs.) in
the profit of Rs. 33,200 at the end of the year.
BY Gagan Pratap
A, B और C ने वाझेदारी में एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। ळुू  में, A ने 29000 का ननलेळ ककया,
जबकक B और C प्रत्येक ने 25000 का ननलेळ ककया। 4 मशीन े बाद, A ने 3000 ननकाऱ नऱए।
इवके 2 मशीन े बाद, C न े 12000 और ननलेळ ककए। लऴ व के अूंत में 33200 के ऱाभ में वे C का
हशस्सा ज्ञात कीनजए।
(RRB NTPC Graduate Level 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three partners X, Y and Z started their business by investing Rs. 40,000, Rs.
38,000 and Rs. 30,000, respectively. After 6 months, X and Z made additional
investments of Rs. 20,000 and Rs. 15,000 respectively, whereas Y withdrew Rs.
8,000. Find the share of Y (in Rs. ) in the total profit of `38,880 made at the end
of the year.
तीन वाझेदारों X, Y और Z ने क्रमळ: Rs. 40,000, Rs. 38,000 और Rs. 30,000 का ननलेळ
करके अऩना व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। 6 मशीने के बाद, X और Z ने क्रमळः Rs. 20,000 और Rs.
15,000 का अधतहरक्त ननलेळ ककया, जबकक Y ने Rs. 8,000 ननकाऱ ददए। लऴव के अूंत में अनजित
Rs. 38,880 के कु ऱ ऱाभ में Y का हशस्सा (Rs. में) ज्ञात कीनजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Lalit and Manoj started a business in partnership investing ₹10,000 and
₹18,000, respectively. After eight months, Nitin joined them by investing
₹24,000. What will be the total share of Nitin and Manoj in the total profit of
₹22,000 earned at the end of 2 years from the starting of the business?
ऱनऱत और मनॉज ने क्रमळः ₹10,000 और ₹18,000 का ननलेळ करके वाझेदारी में एक
व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। आठ मशीने बाद, ननधतन ₹24,000 का ननलेळ करके उनके वाथ ळानमऱ शॉ
गया। व्यलवाय के प्रारभूं वे 2 लऴव के अूंत में, अनजित कु ऱ ऱाभ ₹22,000 में ननधतन और मनॉज का
कु ऱ हशस्सा ककतना शॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Mohan, Rahul, and Geeta enter into a partnership. They invest Rs.35,000,
Rs.75,000 and Rs.1,05,000, respectively. At the end of the first year, Rahul
withdraws Rs.25,000, while at the end of the second year, Geeta withdraws
Rs.75,000. In what ratio will the profit be shared at the end of 3 years?
मॉशन, राहुऱ और गीता एक वाझेदारी में प्रलेळ करते शैं। ले क्रमळः ₹35,000, ₹75,000 और
₹1,05,000 का ननलेळ करते शैं। ऩशऱे लऴव के अतूं में, राहुऱ ने ₹25,000 ननकाऱे, दवू र े लऴव के अूंत
में गीता ₹75,000 ननकाऱ ऱेती शै। 3 लऴव के अतूं में उन तीनों में ऱाभ ककव अनुऩात में बाटूँ ा
जाएगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two friends A and B started a business by investing ₹1,50,000 and ₹2,50,000,
respectively. They agreed to distribute their earnings in the same ratio of
their investments. After an year, the profit earned was ₹6,00,000. Each of
them added ₹50,000 to their respective profits and invested in a different
project. If this project gave an yield of ₹4,20,000, then A’s share in the profit is:
दॉ नमत्रों A और B ने क्रमळः ₹1,50,000 और ₹2,50,000 का ननलेळ करके एक व्यलवाय ळुू 
ककया। ले अऩनी आय कॉ अऩने ननलेळ के वमान अनुऩात में कलतहरत करने के नऱए वशमत हुए।
एक लऴव के बाद, अनजित ऱाभ ₹6,00,000 था। उनमें वे प्रत्येक ने अऩने वूंबूंधधत ऱाभ में ₹50,000
जॉडकर एक अऱग ऩहरयॉजना में ननलेळ ककया। यदद इव ऩहरयॉजना वे ₹4,20,000 की आय हुई
थी, तॉ अनजित ऱाभ में A का हशस्सा ककतना शॉगा?
(SSC CGL MAINS 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P and Q start a shop with a capital of Rs.1,50,000 and Rs.4,50,000, respectively.
After a year, out of the profit of Rs.1,60,000, P gets his share of profit plus some
money that is not a part of the profit, as his salary. If P gets a total of Rs.70,000,
what is the salary (in Rs.) he received?
P और Q क्रमळः Rs.1,50,000 और Rs.4,50,000 की ऩूूंजी वे एक दकु ान ळुू  करत े शैं। एक लऴव
के बाद 1,60,000 के ऱाभ में वे P कॉ अऩने ऱाभ का हशस्सा और कु छ धन जॉ ऱाभ का हशस्सा
नशीं शै, उवके लेतन के ू ऩ में नमऱता शै। यदद P कॉ कु ऱ 70,000 नमऱते शैं, तॉ उवे प्राप्त लेतन
(Rs.म)ें क्या शै?
(RRB NTPC Graduate Level 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A and B entered into a partnership by investing capitals in the ratio . A
being an active partner got Rs 2.5 lakhs out of the annual profit and
remaining profit was divided between them in proportion to their
investments. If A received a total of 5.7 lakhs as profit after one year, then
what is the share (in lakhs) of B in the annual profit?
A और B ने के अनुऩात में ऩूूंजी ननलेळ करके वाझेदारी में प्रलेळ ककया। एक वकक्रय भागीदार
शॉने के नाते एक कॉ लाकऴिक ऱाभ में वे 2.5 ऱाख रुऩये नमऱे और ळेऴ ऱाभ उनके बीच उनके
ननलेळ के अनुऩात में कलभानजत ककया गया। यदद A कॉ एक लऴव के बाद ऱाभ के ू ऩ में कु ऱ 5.7
ऱाख प्राप्त हुए, तॉ लाकऴिक ऱाभ में B का हशस्सा (ऱाख में) क्या शै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A and B invest Rs, 62500, and Rs. 50000 in a business A receives Rs. 180 per
month out of profit for running the business and the rest of the profit is
divided in ratio of investment. If A receives 5980 rs annually, then B receives
how much?
A और B एक व्यलवाय में क्रमळः 62500ू  और 50000 रुऩये ननलेळ करते शै शै। व्यलवाय चऱाने
के नऱए ऱाभ में वे A कॉ प्रधत माश 180 ू  नमऱते शै और बाकी ऱाभ ननलेळ के अनुऩात में बाूंटा
गया शै। यदद A वाऱाना 5980 ू  प्राप्त करता शै, तॉ B ककतना प्राप्त करता शै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Person A started a business by investing Rs.65,000. After a few months, B
joined him by investing Rs.50,000. Three months after the joining of B, C
joined the two with an investment of Rs.55,000. At the end of the year, A got
50% of profit as his share. Find how many months did A alone finance the
business?
व्यथक्त A ने 65000 का ननलेळ करके एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। कु छ मशीनों के बाद, B भी
50000 का ननलेळ करके उवके वाथ जुड गया। B के ळानमऱ शॉने के तीन मशीन े बाद, C भी
55000 के ननलेळ के वाथ दॉनों के वाथ ळानमऱ शॉ गया। लऴव के अूंत में, A कॉ अऩने हशस्स े के
ू ऩ म ें ऱाभ का 50% प्राप्त हुआ। A ने अके ऱे ककतने मशीनों के नऱए व्यलवाय का कलत्तऩॉऴण
ककया?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two persons A and B start a business with investments of Rs24000 and
Rs28000 respectively. After 4months C also joined them with certain
investment. Total profit at the end to the year was Rs19950. C’s share in profit
was Rs7600. What was the C’s investment in the business?
दॉ व्यथक्त A और B क्रमळः Rs. 24000 और Rs. 28000 के ननलेळ के वाथ एक व्यलवाय ळुू 
करते शैं। 4 मशीने के बाद C कु छ ननलेळ के वाथ व्यलवाय में ळानमऱ शॉ गया। लऴव के अूंत में कु ऱ
ऱाभ Rs. 19950 था। ऱाभ में C की हशस्सेदारी 7600 रु थी। व्यलवाय में C का ननलेळ क्या था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C are three partners in a business. A receives 3/7th part of the total
profit and remaining profit is distributed between B and C. if profit return will
increase from 7% to 12% , then profit of A increase by Rs.450.find the total
investment of B& C ?
A, B और C एक व्यलवाय में तीन भागीदार शैं। A कु ऱ ऱाभ का 3/7 लाूँ हशस्सा प्राप्त करता शै और
ळेऴ ऱाभ B और C के बीच कलतहरत ककया जाता शै। यदद व्याऩार का ऱाभ प्रधतळत 7% वे बढ़कर
12% शॉ जाती शै, तॉ A के ऱाभ में Rs. 450 की लृद्धि शॉगी। B और C के कु ऱ ननलेळ ज्ञात कर?े
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C started a business together in which A invested Rs 7000 for 12
months, B invested Rs 8000 for 10 months and C invested Rs 12000 for 6
months. A was an executive member for which he received 20% of the profits
as his remuneration. The total profit earned at the end of one year was Rs
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
What is C's share (in Rs) in this profit?
A, B और C ने वाथ नमऱकर एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया नजवमे A ने 12 मशीने के नऱए रु 7000 का
ननलेळ ककया, B ने 10 मशीने के नऱए रु 8000 का ननलेळ ककया और C ने 6 मशीने के नऱए रु
12000 का ननलेळ ककया। A कायवकारी वदस्य था नजवके नऱए उवे अऩने ऩाहरश्रनमक के ू ऩ म ें
ऱाभ का 20 % प्राप्त हुआ। एक लऴव के अूंत में अनजित कु ऱ ऱाभ रु 14750 था। इव ऱाभ में C का
हशस्सा (रु में) ककतना शै?
(SSC CHSL MAINS 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P and Q enter into a partnership with investments of Rs.1400 and Rs.1800
respectively. They share half of the profit equally for running the business
and the remaining profit in the ratio of their investments. If the difference in
their shares of profits is Rs.47, what is the total profit?
P और Q क्रमळः रु.1400 और रु.1800 के ननलळे के वाथ एक वाझेदारी में प्रलेळ करते शैं। ले ऱाभ
के आधे हशस्से कॉ व्यलवाय के वूंचाऱन के नऱए रखते शैं और ळेऴ हशस्से कॉ अऩन े ननलेळ के
अनुऩात में बाूँट ऱेते शैं। यदद ऱाभ में उनके हशस्सों का अूंतर रु.47 शै, तॉ कु ऱ ऱाभ ज्ञात कीनजए।
RRB JE 22/05/2019 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two persons A and B invested in a business with 115000 and 75000 rupees
respectively. They agree that 60% of the profit should be divided equally
among them and rest is divided between them according to their
investment. If A got 1144 rupees more than B, then the total profit is.
दॉ व्यथक्तयों A और B ने क्रमळः रु 115000 और 75000 रुऩये के वाथ एक व्यलवाय में ननलळे
ककया। ले वशमत शैं कक ऱाभ का 60% उनके बीच वमान ू ऩ वे कलभानजत ककया जाना चाहशए और
बाकी उनके ननलेळ के अनुवार कलभानजत ककया गया शै। यदद A कॉ B वे 1144 रुऩये अधधक
नमऱता शै, तॉ कु ऱ ऱाभ शॉता शै
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A & B started a business with their capital in the ratio 9:13, respectively. They
agreed to share the profit in the ratio of their investments. C joins the
business with the condition that A, B and C will share the profit equally. C
BY Gagan Pratap
pays a sum of Rs. 3,08,000 as a premium for goodwill. What will be the share
of B in this premium?
A और B ने क्रमळः 9:13 के अनुऩात में अऩनी ऩूूंजी के वाथ एक व्यलवाय ळुू  ककया। ले अऩने
ननलेळ के अनुऩात में ऱाभ वाझा करने के नऱए वशमत हुए। C इव ळत व के वाथ व्याऩार म ें
ळानमऱ शॉता शै कक A, B और C वमान ू ऩ वे ऱाभ वाझा करगें े। वी वद्भालना के नऱए
प्रीनमयम के ू ऩ में 3,08,000 रुऩय े का भुगतान करता शै। इव प्रीनमयम में B का हशस्सा ककतना
शॉगा?
(ICAR Technician 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].
